user.description: Add ComfyUI as a Home Assistant AI Task for image generation. This is not an official ComfyUI integration.

error.invalid_file_path: Invalid workflow path, it must start with /config/
error.file_not_found: Workflow file not found at specified path

error.invalid_workflow: Could not parse workflow file. Ensure it is valid JSON.
